title: Hecke Eigenvalues of Ikeda Lifts
abstract: In this paper, we study the Hecke eigenvalues of Ikeda lifts. Using the spherical map for the Hecke algebra of the symplectic group, we obtain an explicit formula for the eigenvalues $λ_F(p^r)$. From this formula, we show that $λ_F(p^r)$ can be written as a polynomial in $p^{\pm 1/2}$ with a positive leading term. Furthermore, we prove that the coefficients of this polynomial are bounded and, as a consequence, the Hecke eigenvalues $λ_F(p^r)$ are positive for all sufficiently large primes $p$.
